problem_text_cn: 类比费马原理，求解均匀重力场中从原点O到P(a,b)的最快下降路线（质点从静止出发无摩擦滑行，时间最短）。
problem_text_en: By analogy with Fermat's principle, solve the brachistochrone curve from the origin O to P(a,b) in a uniform gravitational field（the particle starts from rest and slides without friction, with the shortest time）.
problem_solution_cn: （1）类比光的折射定律：- 费马原理中光沿最短时间路径传播，类比质点最快下降路线，折射率n(y)∝1/v(y)（v(y)=√(2gy)为质点速率）。- 折射定律n₁sinθ₁=n₂sinθ₂，转化为v(y)sinα=常量（α为轨迹切线倾角），得dy/dx=√(y/(C−y))（C为常量）。（2）参数方程推导：- 引入参数β，令y=Csin²β，积分得轨迹参数方程：x=R(β−sinβ)，y=R(1−cosβ)，其中R=C/2。- 由P(a,b)确定R和β范围，轨迹为滚轮线（摆线）。
problem_solution_en: （1）Analogy with Snell's law of refraction：- In Fermat's principle, light travels along the path with the shortest time. By analogy with the particle's brachistochrone curve, the refractive index n(y)∝1/v(y)（v(y)=√(2gy) is the particle's speed）。- Snell's law n₁sinθ₁=n₂sinθ₂ is transformed into v(y)sinα=constant（α is the inclination angle of the trajectory tangent），obtaining dy/dx=√(y/(C−y))（C is a constant）。（2）Derivation of parametric equations：- Introducing parameter β，let y=Csin²β，integrating to get the trajectory parametric equations：x=R(β−sinβ)，y=R(1−cosβ)，where R=C/2。- Determine R and the range of β from P(a,b)，the trajectory is a cycloid。
problem_answer: 最快下降路线为滚轮线（摆线），参数方程$ egin{cases}x=R( eta - \sin eta) \ y=R(1 - \cos eta)\end{cases}$（R由P(a,b)确定）
